craftRegistry.description: Upgrades a Normal item to Magic and adds one modifier when its effective Magic capacity and eligible pool allow one; zero-capacity bases transition with no explicit modifier.
Upgrades a Normal item to Magic and adds one modifier of Minimum Modifier Level 44 when an effective Magic slot exists; zero-capacity bases transition with no explicit modifier.
Upgrades a Normal item to Magic and adds one modifier of Minimum Modifier Level 70 when an effective Magic slot exists; zero-capacity bases transition with no explicit modifier.
Adds a modifier to a Magic item.
Adds a modifier to a Magic item with Minimum Modifier Level 44.
Adds a modifier to a Magic item with Minimum Modifier Level 70.
Upgrades a Normal item to Rare and rolls up to four fresh modifiers within its effective Rare capacity.
Upgrades a Magic item to Rare and adds a modifier.
Upgrades a Magic item to Rare and adds a modifier with Minimum Modifier Level 35.
Upgrades a Magic item to Rare and adds a modifier with Minimum Modifier Level 50.
Adds a modifier to a Rare item with an open affix slot.
Adds a modifier to a Rare item with Minimum Modifier Level 35.
Adds a modifier to a Rare item with Minimum Modifier Level 50.
Removes one removable modifier from a Rare item and adds an eligible replacement.
Modifies a Rare item and applies Minimum Modifier Level 35 to the replacement.
Modifies a Rare item and applies Minimum Modifier Level 50 to the replacement.
Removes a random removable explicit modifier.
Rerolls eligible numeric values on non-fractured modifiers.
Fractures a random revealed modifier on a Rare item with at least four modifiers.
Applies a Lock that previews the next supported item mutation before it is committed.
craftRegistry.blocker: Normalized source item identity is unavailable; existing runtime behavior is preserved without fabricating a source ID or metadata key.

craftRegistry.description: Inferred from the retained socket method and per-base socketCount: adds one empty Rune Socket up to the normalized concrete-base cap.
craftRegistry.assumption: baseItems.bases[].socketCount is the maximum Rune Socket count and a fresh item starts with zero added sockets.

craftRegistry.description: Inferred insertion transition: places this Rune in an empty Rune Socket and applies the exact retained class-specific stat record. Existing socket contents are never replaced or removed.
craftRegistry.assumption: The retained effect precedence is concrete class, then all-equipment, then armour/martial/caster family; limit codes cap matching augment families.

transmutation.description: Upgrades a Normal item to Magic and adds one modifier when its effective Magic capacity and eligible pool allow one; zero-capacity bases transition with no explicit modifier.

perfect-transmutation.description: Upgrades a Normal item to Magic and adds one modifier of Minimum Modifier Level 70 when an effective Magic slot exists; zero-capacity bases transition with no explicit modifier.
